name: zindex_archive_ensure_capacity
description: zIndexArchive::EnsureCapacity grows the records array to max(recordCapacity * 2, requiredCount + 1), stores the new capacity, and reallocates the record buffer.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?EnsureCapacity@zIndexArchive@@QAEXI@Z at 0x4a62f0 still fails: 13 unmasked mismatches, 4 relocation bytes masked, 9 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 56 bytes, VC object symbol size 64 bytes.

Reviewed difference is call/import and branch-label/epilogue shape around realloc; the native archive mount smoke exercises the first-growth path from LoadIndexFromTail and validates record lookup/open behavior after the grow.
